---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## What you expected

What you thought would happen instead.

## Screenshots / console output

If applicable, paste screenshots or the browser console / Node stack
trace. Remove any student-identifying data before posting.

## Environment

- **Where:** live (`canamed-69785.web.app`) / local dev server / other
- **Browser + version:** e.g. Chromium 126
- **OS:** e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04
- **Session code (if reproducible against a live session):**
- **Role at time of bug:** student / facilitator / super-admin

## Additional context

Anything else that might help - a recent PR you suspect, a workaround
you found, related issues.

## Privacy check

- [ ] I have removed any student names, real session codes containing
      live data, or other personal information from this report.
